title: hydrocotyle umbellata var. scaposa
intro: Hydrocotyle umbellata var. scaposa, also known as Pennywort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Araliaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pennywort include reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting eye health, making it a popular herbal remedy for treating conditions such as glaucoma and cataracts. Pennywort can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
